visual_description: Two men in white shirts sit at a desk in an office; one leans forward while the other wipes his face with a tissue and then eats a piece of food. The camera shifts to a close‑up of the two men as they chew and converse, then pulls back to show the man on the left holding a cup and a piece of food while the man on the right holds a cup and a food container, with a microphone and laptop on the desk.
audio_description: The audio features muted conversation and chewing noises with a faint microphone hiss.
